incidentSummary: Order workflow returned NOTIFICATION_PUBLISH_FAILED because notification publish simulation forced a failure path.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: orders notification publisher failure simulation enabled
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Orders logs include notification_publish_failed with matching event and correlation IDs; publish span reports error without external dependency outage signals.

performanceFindings: Incident primarily impacted reliability of notification side effect, not request latency.
missingData: No broker-level acknowledgment metric was available in this capture window.
recommendedActions: Add durable outbox + retry policy to reduce user-visible publish failures.
